notes:
vMLX 1.5.45

Highlights:
- DSV4 DSML/XML tool prompts now render concrete real-tool examples without fake arguments.
- Ollama num_predict/top_k disabled sentinels stay model-owned and are omitted instead of forwarded as invalid overrides.
- VLM video support is no longer guessed from image-only vision support, preventing unsupported video payload crashes.
- Kimi K2.6 tokenizer rendering includes its required tiktoken runtime dependency.
- Bundled app packaging strips third-party .agents metadata from site-packages.

Verification:
- Signed and notarized arm64 DMG passed strict codesign and Gatekeeper assessment as Notarized Developer ID.
- Packaged app release gate passed version, bundled imports, bundled source/content hash, app engine path, panel request/type tests, TypeScript typecheck, pycache cleanup, codesign, and spctl checks.
- Live DSV4 and Hy3 Electron UI proofs exercised built-in plus MCP tools with no raw tool-marker leak.
- Live Hy3 JANGTQ_K A/B and ZAYA1-VL checkpoint covered cache and capability paths called out in the release notes.

Known follow-ups:
- ZAYA1-VL red image probing and exact ACK obedience still need dedicated follow-up.
- Full VLM/video/audio proof remains open for families that genuinely declare video/audio support.

DMG SHA256: 4271240d75a7b0e3568adee231462480cceab1c99bf7cb5ed30c6df6299f9cbc
